description: Analyze an existing game project to produce useful documentation.
Clarify plan implement review and present any user intent or change request in a single workflow.
Navigate significant changes during game dev sprint when implementation is off-track.
Facilitate game brainstorming sessions with game-specific context and techniques.
Game industry domain deep dive subject matter expertise and terminology.
Interactive game brief creation that guides users through defining their game vision.
Create, update, or validate a game's GDD — the primary design artifact covering pillars, mechanics, progression, levels, art, audio, and development epics.
Create comprehensive narrative documentation including story structure character arcs and world-building. Use for story-driven games.
Plan game UX with DESIGN.md and EXPERIENCE.md spines covering UI, HUD, input schemes, and player journeys.
Create, update, or validate a game project's PRD — often derived from a GDD or prepared for external-tool integration.
Create optimized project-context.md for chosen agentic tool consistency.
Produce a scale-adaptive game architecture with engine systems networking and technical design.
Create the Epics and Stories listing from GDD requirements. These are the specs that drive development.
Ensure GDD UX Architecture and Epics Stories are aligned before production begins.
Initialize game test framework architecture for Unity Unreal Engine or Godot projects.
Create comprehensive game test scenarios covering gameplay progression and quality requirements.
Generate or update sprint-status.yaml from epic files.
View sprint progress surface risks and get next action recommendation.
Create Story with comprehensive context for developer agent implementation.
Execute Dev Story workflow implementing tasks and tests.
Perform thorough clean context QA code review on stories flagged Ready for Review.
Facilitate team retrospective after a game development epic is completed.
Forensic case investigation with evidence-graded findings — trace a bug, reconstruct an incident, or model unfamiliar code.
Generate automated game tests.
Scaffold E2E testing infrastructure.
Create structured playtesting plan.
Design performance testing strategy.
Review test quality and coverage.
